theme: Would you prefer living in a large house with a lo

sentences.english: Would you prefer living in a large house with a long commute or a small apartment close to work?
sentences.korean: 먼 거리 통근의 넓은 집과 직장 가까운 좁은 아파트 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I would choose the small apartment close to work without hesitation.
sentences.korean: 망설임 없이 직장 가까운 작은 아파트를 선택하겠어요.

sentences.english: Time is our most valuable resource and a long commute wastes hours of it every single day.
sentences.korean: 시간은 가장 귀중한 자원이고 긴 통근은 매일 몇 시간을 낭비해요.

sentences.english: Someone who commutes two hours each way spends twenty hours a week just traveling — that's like having a second part-time job.
sentences.korean: 편도 2시간 통근하는 사람은 주당 20시간을 이동에만 써요 — 두 번째 아르바이트를 하는 것과 같아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life
Would you prefer living in a large house with a lo
Living in the Present vs. Planning Ahead

theme: Would you prefer living in a large house with a lo

sentences.english: Those hours could be spent exercising cooking healthy meals or spending quality time with family.
sentences.korean: 그 시간을 운동하거나 건강한 식사를 만들거나 가족과 좋은 시간을 보내는 데 쓸 수 있어요.

sentences.english: A smaller living space is a minor inconvenience compared to getting back hours of your life every day.
sentences.korean: 매일 인생의 시간을 되찾는 것에 비하면 좁은 생활 공간은 사소한 불편이에요.
